name: Proofpoint, Inc.
description: Proofpoint, Inc. is a leading cybersecurity and compliance company that protects organizations' greatest assets and biggest risks: their people. Headquartered in the United States, the company provides an integrated suite of cloud-based solutions designed to defend against advanced threats across email, the web, the cloud, and social media. By focusing on human-centric security, Proofpoint helps businesses mitigate risks, ensure regulatory compliance, and safeguard sensitive data from sophisticated cyberattacks. Their innovative platform is trusted by many of the world's most successful companies to secure their digital communications and protect their brand reputation in an increasingly complex threat landscape.
